intro1: Based in Porto and currently studying at **FEUP**, I work with both art and technology, always looking for ways to merge the two and create something new.
intro2: I see every project as an opportunity to improve both my technical skills and aesthetic voice, with the goal of making every new project better than my last one.
skillsDesign: **Design:** Figma, Adobe Creative Suite (Ps, Ai, Id), Procreate.
skillsDevelopment: **Development:** C# (Unity), Java, JavaScript, C/C++ (Arduino), HTML5/CSS3, GDScript.
skillsMotion: **Motion Design:** After Effects, Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve.
